name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, expense policy violations cause payroll discrepancies. We monitor violations and alert payroll ops instead of manual tracking of expenses and policy adherence.
problem_solved: Expense policy violations leading to payroll discrepancies.
features: Weekly summary reports of policy violations
Real-time alerts for expense policy breaches
